channel.title: Local Chapters on Effective Altruism Denmark
channel.description: Recent content in Local Chapters on Effective Altruism Denmark

item.title: EA Copenhagen
item.description:
--
Active Members
--
Events per Month
--
Year Founded

About EA Copenhagen

This page is coming soon. We’re building out information about the Copenhagen chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and chapter overview
  • Upcoming events calendar
  • Regular meetup schedule (e.g., weekly discussion groups, monthly socials)
  • Chapter organizers with photos and bios
  • Meeting location / venue information
  • How to get involved
  • Featured projects and initiatives
  • Photo gallery from past events
  • Testimonials from members
  • Links to local social media and communication channels

Get Involved

Interested in joining EA Copenhagen? Reach out to us at contact@effectivealtruism.dk or find us on our social media channels.

item.title: EA Aarhus
item.description:
--
Active Members
--
Events per Month
--
Year Founded

About EA Aarhus

This page is coming soon. We’re building out information about the Aarhus chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and chapter overview
  • Meet the organizers (Mads Vesterholt, David Fjendbo, Greg Matyasik, Agnes Margrethe Ottosen Gejl)
  • Upcoming events and regular meetup schedule
  • University partnerships (Aarhus University)
  • Meeting locations and venues
  • Current projects and reading groups
  • How to get involved as a student or professional
  • Photo gallery from past events
  • Links to local social media

Get Involved

Interested in joining EA Aarhus? Reach out to us at contact@effectivealtruism.dk or find us on our social media channels.

item.title: EA Odense
item.description:
--
Active Members
--
Events per Month
--
Year Founded

About EA Odense

This page is coming soon. We’re building out the Odense chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and vision for EA Odense
  • Founding team and organizers
  • Connection to University of Southern Denmark (SDU)
  • Planned events and activities
  • Interest form for potential members
  • How students can start an EA group on campus
  • Resources for newcomers to EA
  • Links to national EA Denmark events

Help Us Build This Chapter

EA Odense is looking for passionate organizers! If you’re based in Odense and want to help grow the local EA community, get in touch at contact@effectivealtruism.dk.

item.description:

About EA Aalborg

This page is coming soon. We’re building out the Aalborg chapter.

Possible sections for this page:

  • Welcome message and vision for EA Aalborg
  • Founding team and organizers
  • Connection to Aalborg University (AAU)
  • Planned events and activities
  • Interest form for potential members
  • How to start a reading group or discussion group
  • Resources for newcomers to EA
  • Collaboration opportunities with other Nordic EA chapters

Help Us Build This Chapter

EA Aalborg is looking for passionate organizers! If you’re based in Aalborg and want to help grow the local EA community, get in touch at contact@effectivealtruism.dk.
